# MarTechRise.ai - Technical Digital Analytics Architects

Technical analytics architects for the modern enterprise. We build clean data pipelines that drive growth.

## Core Services
- **Digital Analytics Implementation**: GA4, Adobe Analytics, GTM Server-Side, and Tag Management.
- **Data Strategy & Governance**: Frameworks for data accuracy, privacy compliance (GDPR/CCPA/Consent Mode V2).
- **BI & Visualization**: Looker Studio, Tableau, and Power BI dashboards.
- **Conversion Optimization**: A/B testing, funnel optimization, and user journey analysis.

## Key Capabilities
- Server-Side Tagging
- Custom Data Layer Architecture
- PII Redaction Systems
- HIPAA Compliant Measurement
- Real-time ROI Tracking
